title: Add daily model-update GitHub Actions workflow

requirements.requirement: Daily scheduled run via cron trigger
Fetch latest models from Lilac API

requirements.acceptance: git diff --exit-code on models.json and README.md
If changes detected, commit with descriptive message including date
PR opened against main with model diff summary in body
LILAC_API_KEY read from GitHub Secrets, never echoed in logs
Non-zero exit on API failure, workflow marked failed, no stale PR

success_criteria: Workflow runs on schedule (verified after first scheduled run)
When models change, a PR is opened against main
When no models change, no PR is created
LILAC_API_KEY secret is not exposed in logs
